marketplace.runtimeDisabled: Studio plugin runtime is disabled. Enable VITE_STUDIO_PLUGIN_RUNTIME_ENABLED to browse plugins.
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search plugins by name, id, or description
marketplace.empty: No plugins match the current filters.

plugins.title: Plugins Workspace
plugins.runtimeDisabled: Studio plugin runtime is disabled. Enable VITE_STUDIO_PLUGIN_RUNTIME_ENABLED to run plugins.

appearanceSettings.description: Configure language, theme, region, and the default asset page layout for this browser.

themes.title: Theme pairing
themes.description: Pick the daisyUI theme used for light and dark mode. The navbar toggle only switches mode.

light.label: Light mode theme
light.description: Applied when the navbar is in light mode.

dark.label: Dark mode theme
dark.description: Applied when the navbar is in dark mode.

followSystem.label: Follow system
followSystem.description: Use your operating system appearance preference to choose light or dark mode.
followSystem.navbarHint: Theme mode follows the system preference. Turn this off in Settings to switch manually.

appearanceSettings.layoutDescription: Set the default layout used on the asset page.

compact.label: Compact
compact.description: Square grid layout with adjustable columns.

compactColumns.label: Compact columns
compactColumns.description: Choose how many assets are shown per row when Compact layout is active.

uploadSettings.description: Configure upload settings for this browser.
uploadSettings.controlModeDescription: Select the source used for upload chunk size and concurrency.
uploadSettings.serverModeHint: Chunk size and concurrency use backend recommendations. Local advanced values remain saved but inactive.
uploadSettings.localModeHint: Chunk size and concurrency use locally configured values.
uploadSettings.basicDescription: Configure upload limits and default behavior.
uploadSettings.maxTotalFilesDescription: Maximum number of files you can add to one upload batch.
uploadSettings.lowPowerModeDescription: Use more conservative defaults to reduce CPU and memory usage during uploads.
uploadSettings.advancedDisabledHint: These fields are unavailable while server-managed upload configuration is enabled.
uploadSettings.chunkSizeDescription: Per-file chunk size used by the browser uploader.
uploadSettings.maxConcurrentChunksDescription: Number of chunk uploads the browser may run in parallel for each file.

performanceSettings.profileDescription: Select the default profile for concurrency and memory usage.
performanceSettings.respectMemoryLimitsDescription: Reduce processing intensity when available memory is limited.
performanceSettings.prioritizeUserOperationsDescription: Prioritize operations related to active user interactions.
performanceSettings.maxConcurrentOperationsDescription: Maximum number of heavy processing jobs the browser may run at once.
performanceSettings.changesApply: Changes take effect immediately for new processing operations.

memory_saver.label: Memory Saver
memory_saver.description: Reduce memory usage and processing concurrency.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Balance processing speed and memory usage.

speed.label: Speed Optimized
speed.description: Increase concurrency to favor processing speed.

adaptive.label: Adaptive
adaptive.description: Adjust processing behavior based on detected device capabilities.

aiSettings.description: Manage the Lumilio Agent and AI indexing settings.
aiSettings.agentDescription: Configure the server-side LLM provider and credentials used by the agent.
aiSettings.apiKeyDescription: API keys are write-only. Leaving this field empty keeps the stored key unchanged.
aiSettings.mlDescription: These settings decide which AI indexing tasks run for new or reprocessed assets. Search still falls back to filename matching when semantic runtime is unavailable.
aiSettings.autoModeDescription: Follow the AI runtimes discovered from connected ML services for new indexing jobs.
aiSettings.manualModeDescription: Choose exactly which indexing tasks run when assets are imported or reprocessed.
aiSettings.tasksDescription: These toggles control indexing production, not the search mode shown to users.
aiSettings.autoOverrideHint: Automatic discovery uses the runtime tasks currently available below.
aiSettings.runtimeDescription: Current backend runtime visibility for search and indexing.
aiSettings.runtimeUnavailable: Runtime status is temporarily unavailable. Saving settings is still available.
aiSettings.coverageDescription: Coverage tracks how many existing photos already have each index. Reindex queues a background batch for missing assets only.
aiSettings.queueMissingAssetsHint: Queues up to {{limit}} missing photos using the currently saved indexing settings.
aiSettings.repositoryScopeHint: Leave this on All repositories to queue a global backfill batch.
aiSettings.reindexTasksAutoHint: Auto mode can queue any ML task. Unavailable runtimes will be handled by worker retries.
aiSettings.reindexTasksManualHint: Manual mode only allows tasks that are currently configured and saved.
aiSettings.selectAtLeastOneTask: Select at least one indexing task before queueing reindex.
aiSettings.saveBeforeReindexHint: Save settings before queueing a reindex batch.
aiSettings.reindexQueuedSuccess: Reindex batch queued for existing photos.
aiSettings.existingAssetsHint: Changing these settings does not backfill existing assets. Existing photos need a separate reindex pass to become searchable by new AI tasks.

taskDescriptions.clip: Generates visual embeddings used for Top Results and future semantic matching.
taskDescriptions.ocr: Extracts text inside images so searches can match visible words.
taskDescriptions.caption: Generates scene descriptions that can support richer search later.
taskDescriptions.face: Detects and embeds faces for clustering and future people search.

serverSettings.workingRepositoryDescription: Choose the default repository scope for repository-aware pages and actions. Select All repositories to keep global views.
serverSettings.workingRepositoryHint: This scope is used by assets, home, map, stats, upload, and ML indexing tools when they support repository filtering.
serverSettings.healthCheckDescription: Control how often the app pings the server for health status. Lower values update more frequently but may increase network usage.
serverSettings.capabilitiesDescription: Read-only backend runtime status for ML discovery and the LLM agent.

lumenSettings.title: Lumen on Browser
lumenSettings.description: Lumen is an on browser AI assistant, you can chat with it click the Lumen avatar on the nav bar. Also, It gathers the information for your bio atalas. This function is auto-disabled on mobile phones.
lumenSettings.mobileDisabledWarning: Lumen is disabled on mobile devices due to performance limitations.
lumenSettings.modelDescription: We highly recommend you using Qwen3 series, they are open-sourced, small and powerful. However, you can configure your own model list in Advanced settings, we use WebLLM as our backbone.
lumenSettings.modelListDescription: Check config from WebLLM (Do not edit this unless you know what is it)

mfa.regenerated: Recovery codes have been regenerated successfully.
mfa.qrError: Failed to generate the authenticator QR code.
mfa.bootstrapOnboarding: This is the first Lumilio administrator account. Complete authenticator setup now to secure administrator sign-in from the first session.
mfa.setupTitle: Scan the QR code in your authenticator app
mfa.setupDescription: Use Duo, 1Password, Google Authenticator, or another TOTP-compatible app. If scanning is unavailable, copy the setup details manually.
mfa.qrCaption: If scanning is unavailable, you can still use the manual setup key.
mfa.setupKeyHint: Enter this key manually in your authenticator app if you cannot scan the QR code.
mfa.totpValidation: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.disableWarning: Disabling two-factor authentication will reduce account security. Please confirm with your current password.
mfa.currentPasswordHint: Enter your current password to confirm this security change.
mfa.regenerateHint: Regenerating recovery codes will invalidate all existing codes immediately.
mfa.recoveryCodesHint: Store these one-time codes securely. Each code can be used only once.

emptyState.title: Nothing here yet
emptyState.description: Items will appear here when available.

monitor.title: Server Monitor

subtitles.ml: ML indexing coverage and reindex progress
subtitles.capabilities: Runtime ML discovery and LLM agent status

ml.loadError: Failed to load ML indexing stats.
ml.scopeHint: Choose a repository to inspect coverage for that library only.

monitor.adminOnlyDescription: Queue monitoring and runtime diagnostics are only available to administrators.

jobs.empty: No jobs found with current filters

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{filename}}"?
delete.softDeleteNote: This will mark the photo as deleted. The file will not be permanently removed.

errors.invalidSessionResponse: Authentication response did not include a valid session.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.authenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Please sign in again.
errors.invalidCredentials: The username or password is incorrect.

passkeySupport.browserOnly: Passkeys are available only in a browser environment.
passkeySupport.notSupported: This browser or device does not support passkeys.
passkeySupport.secureContextRequired: Passkeys require a secure browser context.
passkeySupport.httpsRequired: Passkeys require HTTPS outside localhost development.
passkeySupport.unsupportedResponse: Unsupported passkey response was returned by this device.

login.passkeyStartError: Unable to start passkey sign-in for this account.
login.passkeyUnavailable: Passkey sign-in is unavailable for this account on this device.
login.verifySubtitle: Complete sign-in with your authenticator app or a recovery code.
login.passwordSubtitle: Use your password if you prefer not to use a passkey on this device.
login.bootstrapSubtitle: No users exist yet. Create the first account to claim administrator access.
login.usernameSubtitle: Passkey is the primary sign-in method. Password remains available as fallback.
login.bootstrapPromptBody: The first registration becomes administrator and will guide you through passkey or authenticator setup.
login.recoveryHint: Enter one of your one-time recovery codes.
login.totpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
login.usernameHint: 3-32 characters, starting with a letter. Lowercase letters, numbers, dots, underscores, and hyphens are allowed.

register.passkeyUnavailableUseTotp: Passkeys are unavailable in the current environment. Please continue with an authenticator app.
register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Create your username and password first, then secure your account.
register.bootstrapSubtitle: Create your username first, then complete passkey or authenticator setup to finish administrator onboarding.
register.securityChoiceSubtitle: Passkey is recommended when the current device and origin support it.
register.totpSubtitle: Scan the QR code with Duo, 1Password, or any authenticator app, then verify once.
register.recoverySubtitle: These one-time codes are the only fallback if you lose access to your authenticator.
register.bootstrapPromptTitle: You are registering the initial administrator user
register.bootstrapPromptBody: Lumilio will create the first administrator account and require passkey or authenticator enrollment before setup is complete.
register.usernameHint: 3-32 characters, starting with a letter. Lowercase letters, numbers, dots, underscores, and hyphens are allowed.
register.passwordHint: 10-72 characters with at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.
register.passkeyCardBody: Use this device's native passkey flow for the fastest and strongest sign-in.
register.totpCardBody: Choose TOTP if you prefer Duo, 1Password, Google Authenticator, or another app.
register.recoveryReadyBody: Store these recovery codes in a safe place before continuing.

mfa.pageSubtitle: Manage verification, recovery codes, and security settings for your account in one place.
mfa.bootstrapSubtitle: Complete authenticator setup now so the first Lumilio administrator account is protected before you continue.

changePassword.pageSubtitle: After changing your password, you will be signed out and need to sign in again with your new password.
changePassword.currentPasswordHint: Enter your current password to verify your identity.
changePassword.passwordHint: 10-72 characters with at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.

agent.disabled: Lumilio Agent is disabled. Enable it in Settings > AI.
agent.notConfigured: Lumilio Agent is not configured. Complete provider, model, and API key in Settings > AI.
